entities.name: strategy-compounder
entities.context: CLI tool for strategy analysis with configurable decay and consensus parameters

entities.name: Decay Factor
entities.context: Parameter (λ) controlling recency bias in strategy-compounder, default 0.1

entities.name: Consensus Threshold
entities.context: Parameter for 'Locked-In' classification in strategy-compounder, default 0.8

entities.name: Recency Bias
entities.context: Weighting preference toward more recent data, controlled by decay factor

relationships.context: Higher decay values increase recency bias
